name: cline_docs/ — Project Context
description: Cline uses cline_docs/ folder for persistent project context across sessions.
content:
# Project Roadmap

## Current Goal
Build [feature X]

## Completed Tasks
- [x] Initial setup

## Next Steps
- [ ] Add tests
- [ ] Deploy

## Tech Stack
- Runtime: Node.js 20+
- Framework: [your framework]

## Code Standards
- TypeScript strict
- Conventional commits

name: cline_docs/ — Current Task
description: currentTask.md keeps Cline focused on the immediate objective without re-reading all docs.
content:
# Current Task

## Objective
Implement [specific feature]

## Files to Modify
- src/components/MyComponent.tsx

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature works
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] No TypeScript errors

name: .clinerules — Global Rules
description: .clinerules sets persistent behavioral rules for Cline across all projects.
content:
# Cline Global Rules

- Always run tests before declaring done
- Never delete files without asking
- Prefer editing existing files over creating new ones
- Use conventional commits
- Keep diffs small and focused
